name: Berry Yogurt Delight
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups blueberries (or raspberries or strawberries), cleaned/chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush 1/4 cup of the berries.
2. Halve the remaining berries (excluding raspberries and blueberries).
3. Mix the crushed berries with the yogurt and sugar substitute.
4. Spoon halved berries into dessert bowls.
5. Top each bowl with the berry-yogurt mixture.
Serves 4.
Per half-cup serving: 76 calories, 1 gram fat, 16% CFF, 4 grams protein, 13 grams carbohydrate, 43 mg sodium, 4 mg cholesterol.
